ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Text Ruling

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter is now in the Group Harley 29 as a consolidated case. The lead case is Sifford vs. Raybestos Manhattan 301712. Please refer to the lead case 301712 for information on daily occurrence of this case except for the actual disposition on this individual case. The Group Harley 29 is trailing in Room 608 Judge TMason with 2 days notice to the parties involved to appear for hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: J. Rae Lovko, Esq. 510/559-9980 for pltf & opposing party; Shelley K. Tinkoff, Esq. 391-6182 for deft & moving party Metalclad Insulation Corporation.
RULING: The Court takes the matter off calendar (deft accepted pltf's dismissal).
